description: Breadth divergence detector. SPY 20d return + % of 11 SPDR sectors positive + 20d breadth slope + IWM-SPY small-cap lag. BEARISH (SPY up but breadth deteriorating + IWM lagging) or BULLISH (SPY down but breadth improving + IWM leading). Magee 1950s, Whaley 2009, Lo-MacKinlay 1988. ~58% hit / -5-12% (BEAR) or +6-10% (BULL) / 4-8wks. Daily 22 UTC.
